title: SEVERAL TIERS THAT CAN ASSIST IN ASSESSING THE TRAINING PROGRAMMS.
author: Khalimova, Nafisa
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Today’s    world everybody is living in active life that want to change their life in good side. As Ralph Marston mentioned “ What you do today can improve all your tomorrows.” It means    people should try to create the things and methods which ease their life and develop it in the future.    Don Kirkpatrick also did such a necessary creation in evaluating    trainings that can help to show results and development of training. Even this method consists of just four steps: Reaction, Learning, Behavior and Result it really works effectively    if we do it in order to obtain    goals which are expected before a project.
